projects.name: Checkmate.fm
projects.description: I turned a game of chess into a generative musical instrument. Every move, capture, check, and checkmate add to a unique song. Play a game and try it for yourself.

projects.name: Crosstalkie
projects.description: I love doing crosswords with my mom, so I made a 2-player crossword puzzle app. It's got a built-in walkie-talkie, so you can tackle challenging daily puzzles, together.

projects.name: MoonTube
projects.description: I always wanted to turn the moon into a QR code, so I did. No reason, really. But now you can scan the moon and watch space videos.
